verses.text: 'Oh that thou wouldest rend the heavens, that thou wouldest come down,' that mountains might flow at His presence. He longs for God to act mightily. The believer cries for God to break in upon a needy world.

'Oh that thou wouldest rend the heavens, that thou wouldest come down,' that mountains might flow at His presence. He longs for God to act mightily. The believer cries for God to break in upon a needy world.

'Oh that thou wouldest rend the heavens, that thou wouldest come down,' that mountains might flow at His presence. He longs for God to act mightily. The believer cries for God to break in upon a needy world.

Eye has not seen what God prepares 'for him that waiteth for him'; He meets the one who rejoices and works righteousness. Paul echoes this of God's hidden glory. The God who acts for those who wait surpasses all imagining.

Eye has not seen what God prepares 'for him that waiteth for him'; He meets the one who rejoices and works righteousness. Paul echoes this of God's hidden glory. The God who acts for those who wait surpasses all imagining.
'We are all as an unclean thing, and all our righteousnesses are as filthy rags'; none calls on His name. Even our best is defiled. This humbling confession shows that salvation must be all of grace.
'We are all as an unclean thing, and all our righteousnesses are as filthy rags'; none calls on His name. Even our best is defiled. This humbling confession shows that salvation must be all of grace.

'But now, O LORD, thou art our father; we are the clay, and thou our potter'; do not be wroth for ever. He pleads the relation of Maker and made. The clay casts itself on the mercy of the Potter who formed it.

'But now, O LORD, thou art our father; we are the clay, and thou our potter'; do not be wroth for ever. He pleads the relation of Maker and made. The clay casts itself on the mercy of the Potter who formed it.
The holy cities are a wilderness, the temple burned; 'wilt thou refrain... O LORD?' He asks how long God will be silent. The ruin of God's house moves His people to urgent prayer for His help.
